title: Trump says U.S. and Iran will keep talking but declares ceasefire ‘OVER!’
summary_full: The president suggested talks could continue amid military strikes, but analysts say a deeply flawed preliminary truce deal poses obstacles for negotiators.
summary_public: The president suggested talks could continue amid military strikes, but analysts say a deeply flawed preliminary truce deal poses obstacles for negotiators.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Trump says U.S. and Iran will keep talking but declares ceasefire ‘OVER!’
